description: 实现完整数独游戏 App：引擎生成/求解、棋盘交互、笔记/撤销/提示、计时、统计持久化

userStories.title: 安装依赖并配置 Tailwind color tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need zustand, async-storage, lucide icons installed and design system colors configured in tailwind.
acceptanceCriteria: zustand and @react-native-async-storage/async-storage are in package.json dependencies
lucide-react-native and react-native-svg are in package.json dependencies

tailwind.config.js extend.colors contains: primary (#2563EB), primary-light (#DBEAFE), secondary (#7C3AED), secondary-light (#EDE9FE), accent (#F59E0B), surface (#FFFFFF), foreground (#0F172A), foreground-muted (#64748B), user-input (#2563EB), error (#DC2626), error-light (#FEE2E2), border (#E2E8F0), border-thick (#334155), note (#64748B), hint (#059669), background (#F8FAFC)

tailwind.config.js extend.colors also contains dark mode variants under a 'dark' key or as separate tokens (dark-primary #60A5FA, dark-background #0F172A, dark-surface #1E293B, dark-foreground #F1F5F9, etc.)
npm install completes without errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read design-system/MASTER.md for full color token list. Use extend.colors in tailwind.config.js. Dark mode tokens should be prefixed or nested.

userStories.title: 清理脚手架页面并配置 Tab 结构
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the scaffold pages replaced with Game/Stats tabs layout.
acceptanceCriteria: app/(tabs)/explore.tsx is removed
app/(tabs)/index.tsx is a minimal placeholder with text 'Game'
app/(tabs)/stats.tsx exists as a minimal placeholder with text 'Stats'
app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx has two tabs: 'Game' (index) with grid icon and 'Stats' (stats) with chart icon, using lucide-react-native icons
app/modal.tsx is removed or renamed to app/new-game.tsx as placeholder
App launches without crash on iOS/Android/Web
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use lucide-react-native icons (Grid3x3 for Game, BarChart3 for Stats). Keep HapticTab for tab button. Reference existing _layout.tsx pattern.

userStories.title: 定义数独引擎 TypeScript 类型
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all core types defined before implementing logic.
acceptanceCriteria: File lib/sudoku/types.ts exists
Exports type Difficulty = 'easy' | 'medium' | 'hard' | 'expert'
Exports type CellValue = number | null (1-9 or null for empty)
Exports type Board = CellValue[][] (9x9 grid)
Exports type CellState with fields: value (CellValue), isGiven (boolean), notes (Set<number> or number[]), isError (boolean)
Exports type GameBoard = CellState[][] (9x9 grid of CellState)
Exports type Coordinate = { row: number; col: number }
Exports DIFFICULTY_CONFIG record mapping difficulty to { minGivens: number; maxGivens: number }
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Keep notes as number[] (not Set) for JSON serialization with Zustand persist. DIFFICULTY_CONFIG: easy 36-45, medium 27-35, hard 22-26, expert 17-21.

userStories.title: 实现数独求解器 (solve)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a backtracking solver to validate unique solutions and power hints.
acceptanceCriteria: File lib/sudoku/solver.ts exists
Exports function solve(board: Board): Board | null
Returns complete solution for valid puzzles
Returns null for unsolvable/invalid puzzles
Exports function hasUniqueSolution(board: Board): boolean that confirms exactly one solution exists
Exports function validatePlacement(board: Board, row: number, col: number, num: number): boolean that checks row/col/box conflicts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Backtracking algorithm. For hasUniqueSolution, use a counter that stops at 2 solutions found. Import types from ./types.

userStories.title: 实现数独谜题生成器 (generateSolution + createPuzzle)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need puzzle generation with difficulty levels.
acceptanceCriteria: File lib/sudoku/generator.ts exists
Exports function generateSolution(): Board that returns a complete valid 9x9 grid
Exports function createPuzzle(difficulty: Difficulty): { puzzle: Board; solution: Board }
Generated puzzle has givens count within DIFFICULTY_CONFIG range for the difficulty
Generated puzzle has exactly one solution (verified via hasUniqueSolution)
Exports lib/sudoku/index.ts barrel file re-exporting all public API
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: generateSolution: fill diagonal 3x3 boxes first (no conflict possible), then solve the rest. createPuzzle: start from solution, remove cells randomly, verify unique solution after each removal. If removal breaks uniqueness, skip that cell.

userStories.title: 实现 isComplete 和引擎单元测试
userStories.description: As a developer, I need completion check and tests to verify engine correctness.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/sudoku/solver.ts exports function isComplete(board: Board, solution: Board): boolean
Returns true only when all 81 cells match solution
Returns false if any cell is null or mismatched
Test file exists (lib/sudoku/__tests__/engine.test.ts or similar)

Tests cover: generateSolution produces valid grid, createPuzzle returns puzzle with unique solution, validatePlacement detects row/col/box conflicts, solve returns correct solution, isComplete works correctly
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Install jest or vitest if not present. Minimal test setup. A valid grid means each row, column, and 3x3 box contains 1-9 exactly once.

userStories.title: 创建 useGameStore - Zustand store 基础结构
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the game state store with all state fields and basic actions.
acceptanceCriteria: File stores/game-store.ts exists

Store state includes: board (GameBoard), solution (Board), selectedCell (Coordinate | null), isNotesMode (boolean), history (array for undo), difficulty (Difficulty | null), mistakes (number), hintsUsed (number), elapsedTime (number), isPaused (boolean), isCompleted (boolean)
Store actions include: selectCell, placeNumber, erase, toggleNotesMode, undo, hint, newGame, pause, resume, tick (timer increment)
placeNumber action: places number in selected cell if not given, pushes to history, checks for error against solution, increments mistakes if wrong
erase action: clears user-entered cell value, pushes to history
undo action: pops last state from history and restores it
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use zustand create(). Do NOT add persist middleware yet (that's next story). Store selectedCell and isNotesMode in state but they won't be persisted. Use immer middleware for immutable updates if desired.

userStories.title: 实现 useGameStore 高级 actions (hint, notes, newGame, auto-clear notes)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need hint (limited to 3), notes toggle, auto-clear notes on placement, and newGame.
acceptanceCriteria: hint action: reveals correct number from solution in selected cell, marks as hint, increments hintsUsed, no-op if hintsUsed >= 3 or cell not empty/already correct
toggleNote action: in notes mode, toggles number in selected cell's notes array, pushes to history
placeNumber also auto-clears: when number placed, removes that number from notes in all cells of same row/col/box
newGame action: accepts difficulty, calls createPuzzle, resets all game state (board, solution, history, mistakes, hintsUsed, elapsedTime, isPaused, isCompleted)
Game completion detection: after placeNumber, checks isComplete and sets isCompleted=true if done
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Import createPuzzle and isComplete from lib/sudoku. Hint cells should have a special flag (isHint: true in CellState or similar) for styling.

userStories.title: 配置 Zustand persist middleware + hydration loading
userStories.description: As a developer, I need game state persisted to AsyncStorage with throttle and proper hydration.
acceptanceCriteria: useGameStore uses zustand persist middleware with AsyncStorage
partialize only persists: board, solution, difficulty, mistakes, hintsUsed, elapsedTime, isCompleted, history (NOT selectedCell, isNotesMode, isPaused)
Persist uses a throttle/debounce of ~1000ms to avoid excessive writes
Store exports a useGameStoreHydrated() hook or hasHydrated selector that returns true after rehydration
App _layout.tsx keeps expo-splash-screen visible until hydration completes (SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync + hideAsync after hydrated)
App launches and restores previous game state after kill+relaunch
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use zustand/middleware persist with createJSONStorage(() => AsyncStorage). For throttle, wrap storage.setItem. For hydration detection, use onRehydrateStorage callback or the persist API's hasHydrated.

userStories.title: 实现计时器逻辑 + AppState 前后台监听
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the game timer to tick every second and pause on background.
acceptanceCriteria: A custom hook or component (hooks/useGameTimer.ts) manages setInterval for ticking
Timer increments elapsedTime in store every 1 second when game is active (not paused, not completed)
Timer pauses when app goes to background (AppState 'inactive'/'background')
Timer resumes when app returns to foreground (AppState 'active')
Timer does NOT persist the interval ID - on rehydration, calculates time compensation if needed using stored lastActiveTimestamp
Store adds lastActiveTimestamp field (updated on each tick or on background event), persisted
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use React Native AppState API. On foreground resume: if lastActiveTimestamp exists and game was active, do NOT add background time (timer was paused). This is correct behavior - we only count active play time.

userStories.title: 实现 Board 组件 - 9×9 Grid 布局
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the sudoku grid with clear 3×3 box separators.
acceptanceCriteria: File components/Board/Board.tsx exists
Renders 9 rows of 9 cells using nested View (no FlatList)
3×3 box boundaries have thick border (2px, border-thick color)
Individual cell boundaries have thin border (0.5px hairline, border color)
Board width is responsive: (screenWidth - 2 * horizontalPadding) with cells = boardWidth / 9
Board has white/surface background
Uses NativeWind classes where possible
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use useWindowDimensions for screen width. Horizontal padding 16px each side. Cell size = (width - 32) / 9. Use StyleSheet for borders that need precise px control (NativeWind doesn't support 0.5px). Wrap in React.memo.

userStories.title: 实现 Cell 组件 - 数字/笔记显示 + 样式区分
userStories.description: As a user, I want cells to show numbers (given/user/hint) and pencil-mark notes.
acceptanceCriteria: File components/Board/Cell.tsx exists
Given numbers render bold (font-weight 700) in foreground color
User-entered numbers render medium weight (500) in user-input/primary color
Hint numbers render in hint/green color
Error numbers render in error/red color
Notes render as small 3×3 grid of numbers (10px) in note/muted color within the cell
Empty cells render blank
Cell uses React.memo with custom comparator to prevent unnecessary re-renders
Uses Zustand selector to subscribe only to its own cell state
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Each Cell subscribes to useGameStore(state => state.board[row][col]) for its own data. Use tabular-nums font variant for number alignment. Notes grid: 3 rows of 3, each position maps to number 1-9.

userStories.title: 实现选中高亮逻辑
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which cell is selected and its related row/col/box highlighted.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping a cell sets it as selected (distinct background color: primary)
All cells in same row as selected get primary-light background
All cells in same column as selected get primary-light background
All cells in same 3×3 box as selected get primary-light background
All cells containing the same number as selected cell get secondary-light background
Highlight priority: selected > same-number > same-row/col/box > normal
Pressing a cell triggers Pressable onPress, not relying on hover
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Cell component reads selectedCell from store and computes its own highlight state. Use a helper function to determine which highlight category a cell falls into given selectedCell coordinate.

userStories.title: 实现冲突标记（错误高亮）
userStories.description: As a user, I want conflicting numbers to be visually marked in red.
acceptanceCriteria: When a user places a number that conflicts with another cell in same row/col/box, both cells show error styling
Error styling: red text color (error token) + light red background (error-light token)
Conflicts are computed from the current board state (not just against solution)
When the conflicting value is removed/changed, error styling is removed
Given cells that conflict with user input also show error indicator
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Compute conflicts in the store or as a derived selector. A cell has a conflict if another cell in its row/col/box has the same non-null value. Store this as a computed property, not stored state.

userStories.title: 实现 NumberPad 组件
userStories.description: As a user, I want a number pad (1-9) to input values into the selected cell.
acceptanceCriteria: File components/Controls/NumberPad.tsx exists
Displays 9 number buttons in a single row
Each button minimum 44×44dp touch target with 8dp gap between
Tapping a number calls placeNumber (or toggleNote if notes mode active) in game store
When all 9 instances of a number are correctly placed, that button shows disabled (opacity 0.3, not pressable)
Numbers use tabular-nums font, size 20px, centered
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use Pressable (not TouchableOpacity). Compute which numbers are completed: count occurrences of each number that match solution. A number is 'done' when count === 9.

userStories.title: 实现操作栏 (Undo/Erase/Notes/Hint)
userStories.description: As a user, I want action buttons for undo, erase, notes toggle, and hint.
acceptanceCriteria: File components/Controls/ActionBar.tsx exists
4 buttons in a row: Undo, Erase, Notes, Hint
Each button has icon (lucide) + label text below
Each button minimum 44×44dp touch target
Undo button disabled (opacity 0.3) when history is empty
Hint button shows remaining count (e.g., '3' badge), disabled at 0
Notes button has active indicator when isNotesMode is true (background color change)
All buttons have accessibilityLabel
Tapping each button calls corresponding store action
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Icons: Undo2 for undo, Eraser for erase, PencilLine for notes, Lightbulb for hint. Use lucide-react-native. Hint badge shows (3 - hintsUsed).

userStories.title: 组装游戏主屏 (index.tsx)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the game screen with header info, board, and controls assembled.
acceptanceCriteria: app/(tabs)/index.tsx renders: top info bar + Board + ActionBar + NumberPad
Top info bar shows: difficulty label, timer (MM:SS format), mistakes count, hints remaining (X/3)
Timer displays formatted elapsedTime from store
Layout fits on screen without scrolling (board + controls visible together)
Bottom area has safe area padding (for home indicator)
When no game exists (first launch or after hydration with no saved game), shows a 'New Game' button or redirects to new-game modal
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use useSafeAreaInsets for bottom padding. Timer format: Math.floor(elapsed/60).toString().padStart(2,'0') + ':' + (elapsed%60).toString().padStart(2,'0'). Include useGameTimer hook here.

userStories.title: 实现暂停覆盖层
userStories.description: As a user, I want to pause the game and hide the board.
acceptanceCriteria: A pause button exists in the top info bar (Pause icon from lucide)
Tapping pause: sets isPaused=true in store, timer stops
When isPaused, an opaque overlay covers the board and controls
Overlay shows a 'Resume' button (Play icon)
Tapping resume: sets isPaused=false, timer resumes
Overlay prevents seeing the board (user cannot peek)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use absolute positioning for overlay. Background color should be surface/background (not transparent). Show elapsed time and difficulty on the pause screen so user knows context.

userStories.title: 实现完成弹窗
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a congratulations screen when I complete a puzzle.
acceptanceCriteria: When isCompleted becomes true in store, a completion modal/overlay appears
Shows: 'Congratulations!' title, elapsed time formatted, difficulty level, mistakes count
Has 'New Game' button that navigates to new-game difficulty selection
Completion overlay covers the board
Timer is stopped on completion
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Can be a simple overlay component within index.tsx, or a modal. Trigger expo-haptics success notification on completion.

userStories.title: 创建 new-game modal 页面 - 难度选择
userStories.description: As a user, I want to choose difficulty when starting a new game.
acceptanceCriteria: File app/new-game.tsx exists with presentation: 'modal' in _layout.tsx
Shows 4 difficulty cards: Easy, Medium, Hard, Expert
Each card shows difficulty name and description (e.g., Easy: '36-45 givens, relaxed pace')
Tapping a card calls newGame(difficulty) in store then navigates back to game screen (router.back())
If game is in progress when opening, shows confirmation before starting new game
Modal can be dismissed (swipe down or X button) to cancel
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Register in _layout.tsx as Stack.Screen with presentation:'modal'. Confirmation dialog: use Alert.alert on native. Cards should have clear visual hierarchy.

userStories.title: 创建 useStatsStore + 记录完成游戏
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a stats store to record and aggregate game results.
acceptanceCriteria: File stores/stats-store.ts exists
Uses Zustand with persist middleware + AsyncStorage
State: history (array of GameResult), max 100 entries
GameResult type: { difficulty, elapsedTime, mistakes, completedAt (ISO string) }
Action: recordGame(result) pushes to history, trims to 100
Selectors: getStatsByDifficulty(difficulty) returns { gamesPlayed, bestTime, averageTime, winRate }
Selectors: getOverallStats() returns { totalPlayed, totalWon, currentStreak, bestStreak }
In useGameStore: when isCompleted is set to true, also call recordGame on stats store
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: currentStreak: consecutive completed games (any difficulty). bestStreak: all-time max consecutive. winRate: completed games / total games started (track totalStarted as well, or just count history length as completed).

userStories.title: 实现统计页面 - 总体统计卡片
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my overall game statistics.
acceptanceCriteria: app/(tabs)/stats.tsx renders statistics UI
Top section shows overall stats cards: Total Games, Win Rate (%), Current Streak, Best Streak
Each card has label + value, rounded corners (12px), surface background
Cards use 2-column grid layout
Values come from useStatsStore getOverallStats()
Empty state: if no games played, show friendly message 'No games yet. Start playing!'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Cards follow design system: rounded-xl, bg-surface, p-4, flat style. Use NativeWind classes.

userStories.title: 实现统计页面 - 分难度统计 + 历史记录
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see per-difficulty stats and recent game history.
acceptanceCriteria: Below overall stats: difficulty filter tabs (Easy/Medium/Hard/Expert/All)
Selecting a difficulty shows: games played, best time (formatted MM:SS), average time
Below stats: scrollable list of recent games using FlashList
Each history item shows: date, difficulty badge, time, mistakes count
List limited to 100 items, most recent first
Empty state per difficulty: 'No games at this difficulty yet'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use @shopify/flash-list for the history list. Difficulty badges: colored background matching difficulty. Date format: relative ('Today', 'Yesterday', or 'MM/DD').

userStories.title: 添加触觉反馈
userStories.description: As a user, I want haptic feedback on key interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Number placement triggers Haptics.impactAsync(ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light)
Error placement (wrong number) triggers Haptics.notificationAsync(NotificationFeedbackType.Error)
Game completion triggers Haptics.notificationAsync(NotificationFeedbackType.Success)
Hint usage triggers Haptics.impactAsync(ImpactFeedbackStyle.Medium)
Haptics only fire on native (iOS/Android), not web
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: expo-haptics is already in the project (used by HapticTab). Import from 'expo-haptics'. Use Platform.OS check or try-catch for web.

userStories.title: 适配深色模式
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to respect system dark mode setting.
acceptanceCriteria: Board background uses surface color that switches in dark mode (white → dark-surface)
Board borders use border/border-thick tokens that adapt to dark mode
Cell text colors adapt (foreground, user-input, error, hint, note all have dark variants)
Page backgrounds use background token (light gray → dark navy)
Number pad and action bar adapt to dark mode
Stats page cards adapt to dark mode
NativeWind dark: classes used throughout OR colorScheme-based token switching
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: NativeWind supports dark: prefix (e.g., 'bg-surface dark:bg-dark-surface'). Alternatively, use useColorScheme hook and conditional token objects. Reference design-system/MASTER.md dark mode section.

userStories.title: 边界情况处理 + 谜题生成性能
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to handle edge cases gracefully and not freeze on puzzle generation.
acceptanceCriteria: No crash when tapping number pad with no cell selected
Undo button disabled when history empty (visual + functional)
Hint button disabled when hintsUsed >= 3 (shows 0/3)
Erase on given cell is no-op (no crash, no state change)
Cannot place number in given cell
newGame uses InteractionManager.runAfterInteractions or setTimeout(0) to defer generation off the UI thread
A brief loading indicator shows while puzzle generates (if > 100ms)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use InteractionManager from react-native. Show a simple ActivityIndicator or keep the new-game modal open with loading state until puzzle is ready.
